creator: renchap@cocoa-x.com
text:
Created attachment 146863
sysutils/rubygem-chef patch

Port is currently broken. This patch updates it to 11.14.6 and fixes the dependancy to use mime-types ~> 1.16, as needed in the gemspec.

193342 needs to be merged before this one.

Tested with poudriere testport / portlint and chef-client is working again.
